jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Ajio
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ajio. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Ajio:
Ajio is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ajio!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
